description_long: This object consists of three Aveeno Skin Relief personal care products, each in a different type of container. The first is a tall, rounded bottle with a blue screw-on cap and a printed label, likely for body lotion. The second is a squeezable tube with a blue flip-top cap, designed for easy dispensing of cream or lotion. The third is a pump bottle with a blue and white pump dispenser, ideal for controlled application of lotion. All containers are primarily white with blue accents and feature clear printed branding and product information. The surfaces are smooth and glossy, typical of plastic packaging for skincare products. These items are commonly found in urban environments such as public restrooms, gyms, or personal bags.
description: A set of three Aveeno Skin Relief lotion containers: a pump bottle, a squeeze tube, and a capped bottle, all in white with blue accents and clear branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three containers with visible Aveeno branding and product labels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profiles of the containers, with the pump and cap mechanisms visible from the side.
description_view_2: Reverse front view with the pump bottle on the left, tube in the center, and capped bottle on the right, all labels facing forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backs and side profiles of the containers, with pump and cap details visible.
